title: Tolvi vault metadata
description: The .vault-meta.json marker file at the root of every Tolvi vault directory.

workspace.description: The workspace this vault belongs to. Used by the server for multi-tenant isolation. Slug format: lowercase ASCII alphanumerics with single hyphens between them, never as the first or last character.

embedding_model.description: The embedding model used to index this vault locally. Default value SHOULD be `nomic-embed-text` (Ollama).

schema_version.description: Tolvi vault format version. For tolvi-format-v1, MUST be 1.
